response.overview: David is a young man numbed by addiction, abandonment, and the scars of abuse... struggling to hold himself together. After a violent blackout, he awakens alone on a desolate beach with no memory of how he got there... only the lingering sense that something is different. As night rises, the world around him begins to shift. His senses sharpen. His thoughts darken. Hunger gnaws at him - not for drugs or alcohol, but for something far more primal. With each passing hour, David is consumed by a new craving... and an intoxicating sense of power that feels impossible to resist. What begins as confusion spirals into revelation. David is changing, and as his humanity slips away, he's forced to confront a new truth... his newest addiction gives him purpose.. It feeds to survive.
response.title: One of Us
